data.body: WS-B1 DONE + committed (6374ed15): workflow.v1.schema.json (immutable, version-pinned) + schema.py (hardened YAML 1.2-Core safe-parser: anchors/merge/1.1-bools rejected, byte cap, single-doc; version gate; validate_document collects all errors; deterministic dump/hash). 21 unit tests; schema-coverage + llm-optionality green. Added pyyaml>=6 to core deps. Next: WS-B3 (migrate shim) then WS-B2 (linter).
